parsed.explanation: Three corrections were made: 1) The second BIBL element (Sapientia Mos...) was missing its closing </BIBL> tag before the next BIBL began — a closing tag was inserted after <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT>. 2) The ampersand '&' in 'Vita & Scriptis' was escaped to '&' to make it valid XML. 3) A nested BIBL inside the second BIBL (Bibl. / Interpp. Reineccii) was incorrectly nested — it was un-nested and made a sibling BIBL element instead, consistent with the flat structure of all other entries in the list.
